page.settingsDescription: Local desktop preferences and workspace state
page.emptyDescription: Select a plugin or command to inspect.

empty.title: No command selected
empty.choose: Choose a command from the list.

outputState.commandDidNotReturnOutput: The command did not return output.
outputState.runCommandToSeeOutput: Run a command to see output.
outputState.errorWithoutOutput: The command returned an error without output.

empty.title: No plugin selected
empty.choose: Choose a plugin from the list.

plugin.contributedCommandsDescription: Commands declared by this plugin manifest.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Desktop settings backed by Tooldeck preferences.

locale.label: Language
locale.description: Controls the language used by Tooldeck desktop surfaces.

navigationMode.label: Navigation mode
navigationMode.providerFirstDescription: Browse by plugin, then choose an entry.
navigationMode.entryFirstDescription: Browse commands and other entries directly.

sidebarCollapsed.label: Sidebar collapsed
sidebarCollapsed.description: Keep the sidebar collapsed to show icons only.

workspace.title: Local Workspace
workspace.description: Trusted plugin data for this desktop instance.

scope.title: V1 Scope
scope.description: Current desktop settings stay inside the local MVP boundary.
scope.manifestScanningDescription: Plugin manifests are scanned without activating plugin code.
scope.sqliteStateDescription: Plugin registry and command run history are persisted as core local state.
